title: YEET! The Elite
description:
Earth has had enough.

After centuries of corruption, greed, and endless chaos, the planet has decided to solve the problem the only way it knows how:

Grab the elites...
and YEET them into the Sun.

YEET! The Elite! is a chaotic arcade action game where you play as Earth itself, snatching elite figures from the surface and hurling them across the solar system in a desperate attempt to burn them away forever.

Unfortunately, the rest of the solar system refuses to mind its own business.

The Moon, Venus, and Mercury swat your targets back toward Earth in frantic cosmic rallies that turn every throw into a fast-paced battle of timing, positioning, and precision. Miss too many throws and UFOs begin returning escaped elites back to the planet while hunting you down across the battlefield.

Every match becomes an escalating struggle to reach your target score before the chaos spirals completely out of control.

Features:
• Play as Earth itself with cartoon-style floating hands
• Grab, charge, and YEET elite figures into the Sun
• Physics-driven planetary swats and chaotic cosmic rebounds
• Multiple elite target types with different score values
• Dynamic interference from the Moon, Venus, and Mercury
• UFO encounters that escalate the danger when elites escape
• Reach your target score to win before Earth is overwhelmed
• Multiple selectable music tracks during gameplay
• Stylized low-poly visuals packed with cosmic chaos
• Controller and keyboard support
• Lightweight performance designed to run well on a wide range of hardware

The planet is angry.
The Sun is hungry.
And the elites keep coming.

Time to YEET.
description_short: Play as Earth itself in this chaotic arcade action game where you grab elite figures and YEET them into the Sun while dodging UFOs and surviving frantic planetary swats from the Moon, Venus, and Mercury.
